---
title: "EDARK Report"
subtitle: "`r paste('Date created:', format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'))`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: true
    self_contained: true
params:
  sections: NULL
  dataset_summary_df: NULL
  report_type: "all_vars"
  linked_var_anchors: NULL
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
/* ── Clean up the floating TOC — remove box, keep vertical list ── */
#TOC {
  background: none;
  border: none;
  box-shadow: none;
  padding: 4px 0;
}
#TOC ul {
  padding-left: 12px;
}
#TOC li {
  list-style: none;
  line-height: 1.7;
}
#TOC a {
  color: #555;
  font-size: 0.85em;
  text-decoration: none;
}
#TOC a:hover {
  color: #2c7be5;
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* ── Back-to-top link ── */
.back-to-top {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 8px;
  font-size: 0.78em;
  color: #aaa;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.back-to-top:hover {
  color: #2c7be5;
}

/* ── Section separator ── */
.section-rule {
  border: none;
  border-top: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  margin: 28px 0 18px 0;
}

/* ── Dataset summary table ── */
.summary-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 0.82em;
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
}
.summary-table th {
  background: #f0f0f0;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #ccc;
  padding: 5px 8px;
  text-align: right;
  font-weight: bold;
}
.summary-table th:first-child { text-align: left; }
.summary-table td {
  padding: 4px 8px;
  text-align: right;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.summary-table td:first-child { text-align: left; }
.summary-table tr:nth-child(even) td { background: #f7f7f7; }
.summary-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: 2px solid #ccc; }

/* ── Section flextable overrides ── */
.section-ft { margin-top: 16px; }
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 10,
  fig.height = 5.5
)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# Anchor ID generator — must match .make_html_anchor() in generate_report.R
make_anchor <- function(x) {
  x <- tolower(x)
  x <- gsub("[^a-z0-9_-]", "-", x)
  x <- gsub("-+", "-", x)
  x <- gsub("^-+|-+$", "", x)
  paste0("sec-", x)
}

report_type        <- params$report_type
linked_var_anchors <- params$linked_var_anchors   # named vector: var_name -> "#sec-..."
```

## Dataset Summary

```{r dataset-summary, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(params$dataset_summary_df)) {
  df      <- params$dataset_summary_df
  linked  <- linked_var_anchors   # named: var -> anchor_id

  # Format numeric columns: NA → em-dash
  num_cols <- c("Min", "Max", "Mean", "SD", "Median", "IQR", "Skewness", "Kurtosis")
  df_disp  <- df
  for (col in num_cols) {
    df_disp[[col]] <- ifelse(is.na(df_disp[[col]]), "\u2014", as.character(df_disp[[col]]))
  }
  df_disp$Top_values <- ifelse(is.na(df_disp$Top_values), "\u2014", df_disp$Top_values)

  # Make Variable column a clickable link where the variable has a section anchor
  df_disp$Variable <- vapply(df_disp$Variable, function(v) {
    if (!is.null(linked) && v %in% names(linked)) {
      paste0('<a href="#', linked[[v]], '">', v, '</a>')
    } else {
      v
    }
  }, character(1))

  # Render as plain HTML table so links are preserved (flextable strips HTML)
  col_headers <- c(
    "Variable", "Type", "N", "N Missing", "% Miss", "Unique",
    "Min", "Max", "Mean", "SD", "Median", "IQR", "Skewness", "Kurtosis",
    "Top Values (categorical)"
  )
  names(df_disp) <- col_headers

  cat('<div style="overflow-x:auto;">\n')
  cat('<table class="summary-table">\n<thead><tr>')
  for (h in col_headers) cat(paste0('<th>', h, '</th>'))
  cat('</tr></thead>\n<tbody>\n')
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df_disp))) {
    cat('<tr>')
    for (j in seq_along(col_headers)) {
      val <- df_disp[i, j]
      cat(paste0('<td>', if (is.na(val)) "\u2014" else val, '</td>'))
    }
    cat('</tr>\n')
  }
  cat('</tbody></table></div>\n')
}
```

---

```{r sections, results='asis'}
for (sec in params$sections) {
  anchor_id <- sec$anchor  # e.g. "sec-age-tx"

  # ── Section heading with explicit anchor ──────────────────────────────
  cat(paste0('## ', sec$title, ' {#', anchor_id, '}\n\n'))

  # ── Plot(s) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # histogram_density sections carry a list of two ggplots (split_panels = TRUE);
  # all other sections carry a single ggplot. Print each at full height.
  plot_list <- if (is.list(sec$plot_obj) && !inherits(sec$plot_obj, "ggplot")) {
    sec$plot_obj
  } else {
    list(sec$plot_obj)
  }
  for (pl in plot_list) {
    print(pl)
    cat('\n\n')
  }

  # ── Summary table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (!is.null(sec$summary_ft)) {
    cat('<div class="section-ft">')
    print(flextable::htmltools_value(sec$summary_ft))
    cat('</div>\n\n')
  }

  # ── Back to top ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  cat('<a href="#" class="back-to-top">\u2191 Back to top</a>\n\n')
  cat('<hr class="section-rule">\n\n')
}
```
